scripts.dev: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron electron/main.js"
scripts.build:win: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run clean:dist-electron && electron-builder --win && npm run clean:after-package
scripts.build:mac: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run clean:dist-electron && electron-builder --mac && npm run clean:after-package
scripts.build:linux: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run clean:dist-electron && electron-builder --linux && npm run clean:after-package
scripts.build:all: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run clean:dist-electron && electron-builder --win --mac --linux && npm run clean:after-package
scripts.dist: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run clean:dist-electron && electron-builder && npm run clean:after-package
scripts.dist:dir: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run clean:dist-electron && electron-builder --dir
scripts.test: node tests/test-version-sync.js && node tests/test-electron-version.js && node tests/test-push-loop.js && node tests/test-pr-fix-loop.js && cd backend && python -m pytest ../tests -v && node ../tests/test-electron-path.js && node ../tests/test-electron-ipc-allowlist.js && node ../tests/test-backend-heavy-methods-sync.js && node ../tests/test-electron-ipc-stdout-parser.js && node ../tests/test-html-sanitizer.js && node ../tests/test-html-csp-meta.js && node ../tests/test-backend-spawner.js && node ../tests/test-backend-spawner-handshake.js && node ../tests/test-backend-spawner-recovery.js && node ../tests/test-backend-spawner-midflight-exit.js && node ../tests/test-backend-spawner-health.js && node ../tests/test-backend-spawner-shutdown.js && node ../tests/test-electron-dialogs.js && node ../tests/test-vouched-paths.js && node ../tests/test-ipc-router-prepare-params.js && node ../tests/test-electron-preload.js && node ../tests/test-electron-menu.js && node ../tests/test-electron-logo-storage.js && node ../tests/test-enable-build-signing.js && node ../tests/test-build-size-guards.js && cd ../frontend && npx vitest run
scripts.audit:npm: npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=high && cd frontend && npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=high
scripts.ci: npm run lint:python && npm run typecheck:backend && npm run audit:python && npm run typecheck:frontend && npm test
